next_steps: Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for fungal, mycobacterial, and bacterial staining/cultures
Blood cultures for bacteria, fungi, and mycobacteria
Continue empiric coverage for Pneumocystis jirovecii until diagnostic confirmation
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for comprehensive infectious workup (AFB, fungal, bacterial cultures, PCP DFA, CMV PCR)
High-resolution computed tomography of the chest
Blood cultures for fungi and mycobacteria
Continue empiric broad-spectrum antimicrobial coverage including TMP-SMX
Close monitoring of respiratory status and preparation for mechanical ventilation if deterioration continues
